title: Information Geometry Self-Referential Shadow Analysis

fisher.note: Fisher metric itself is EML-2: g_{ij} = E[∂_i log p · ∂_j log p] = EML-2
fisher.self_reference: EML operator encodes Fisher metric: eml(θ·x, -log Z(θ)) = θ·x + log Z(θ) = log p(x;θ) + const. The Fisher metric IS the Hessian of log Z(θ): g = ∂²log Z = EML-2. Self-referential: EML analyzes EML (eml encodes Fisher, Fisher describes EML).

eml_geometry.object: EML operator eml(x,y) = exp(x) - ln(y) as geometric object

shadow_analysis.reason: eml(x,y) is explicitly computable: it IS EML-2 (exp+log). No EML-∞ content.

eml_manifold.description: The manifold M_EML = {(x,y) : eml(x,y) = c}: level sets of EML

learning_coefficient.description: λ = min RLCT: real log canonical threshold (Watanabe)
learning_coefficient.why: RLCT = rational number from resolution of singularities: EML-2 (algebraic)

free_energy_expansion.description: F_n = nL(w_0) + λlog n - (m-1)log log n + O(1)
free_energy_expansion.why: log n and log log n: EML-2 (nested logs, but real-valued)

singular_learning_theory.why: RLCT gives shadow via log-expansion: real-valued algebraic quantity = EML-2

dually_flat.object: Loss of dual flatness (beyond exponential family)

curved_exponential_family.description: Non-exponential family approximation: shadow at EML-2
curved_exponential_family.why: Best EML-2 (flat) approximation = EML-2 shadow of non-exponential EML-∞ model

eml_of_log_partition.note: log of log: nested EML operations stay EML-2

shadow_of_self_reference.why: EML analyzing EML = EML-∞ (complete self-reference). Shadow: the best constructive approximation is Fisher geometry = EML-2. Self-referential closure: depth(self-reference of EML) = 2 = EML depth of EML. The EML hierarchy is SELF-CONSISTENTLY EML-2 when it analyzes itself.

fixed_point.significance: EML is a fixed point: its self-referential shadow = its own depth

info_shadow.self_referential_result: EML is fixed point: self-shadow = own depth = 2

key_theorem: The Self-Referential Shadow Theorem (S271): The EML operator and its associated information geometry are EML-2. When EML is applied to itself (meta-level analysis), the result is EML-∞ (complete self-reference = undecidable by Gödel-type argument). BUT: the shadow of this self-referential EML-∞ is EML-2 — the Fisher geometry. This is a FIXED POINT:   depth(EML) = 2   shadow(EML-analyzing-EML) = 2   → shadow(self-reference of EML) = depth(EML) = 2. The EML hierarchy is self-consistently EML-2: its own shadow equals its own depth. Statistical manifold singularities (Watanabe singular learning): shadow=EML-2 via RLCT (real log canonical threshold) = algebraic rational number. All information geometry EML-∞ objects shadow at EML-2: no EML-3 shadows found. This is because information geometry is fundamentally MEASUREMENT (entropy, divergence), not oscillation (complex phases) — confirming the measurement/oscillation dichotomy.
rabbit_hole_log: EML is fixed point: depth(EML)=2 = shadow(EML-analyzing-EML): self-referential consistency
All info-geometry EML-∞ objects shadow at EML-2: pure measurement domain
Watanabe RLCT: shadow=EML-2 (algebraic rational number, free energy expansion)
No EML-3 shadow in information geometry: no complex phases in Fisher/KL structure
Self-referential loop confirms S241 finding: EML is EML-2 object that analyzes itself at EML-2
